name: Claude Code Example Runtime Profile
used_for: AI judgement input, not fixed routing
can_read_files: depends on project and additional directory settings
can_write_files: depends on runtime permissions and user approval
supports_external_dirs: may require local settings or session directory access
external_dir_config: local settings should remain local and uncommitted
known_strengths: thin binding can point back to AgentPal core gates
can keep active project root separate from AgentPal workspace root when configured correctly
known_limits: settings changes may require restart or a runtime-specific directory grant
availability of tools and external directory reads varies by session
risk_notes: do not commit local settings containing private machine configuration
do not copy full AgentPal Pal Packs into the external project
recommended_use_as_candidate: project-local file work with AgentPal as Pal source
refresh_policy: manual review when Claude Code binding files or local directory access change
